arts.ttl: Ivan Juric hails ‘incredible’ Southampton fans after record-breaking relegation
arts.sum: Saints’ fate was sealed with seven fixtures left to make it the earliest relegation in Premier League history.

arts.ttl: Southampton relegated after 3-1 loss at Spurs
arts.sum: Southampton suffered the earliest-ever relegation in Premier League history after they lost 3-1 at Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Southampton boss blames "huge" problem behind the scenes after relegation confirmed
arts.sum: Ivan Juric hailed Southampton fans for how they responded to Premier League relegation as head coach points finger of blame at club's recruitment decisions for doomed campaign

arts.ttl: Southampton face more misery after unwanted Premier League record set against Tottenham
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM 3-1 SOUTHAMPTON: Brennan Johnson scored twice in the first half to set Spurs on their way to a confidence-boosting win and send Saints back to the Championship

arts.ttl: What Cristian Romero did to Brennan Johnson before Tel scored Tottenham's penalty vs Southampton - Journalist
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur fans have been left wondering why Brennan Johnson didn’t take the penalty he to complete his hat trick, with Mathys Tel instead took...
Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou says his team's 3-1 victory over Southampton was "much-needed" after a "passive and sloppy" second half.

arts.ttl: Ramsdale admits relegated Southampton haven’t been good enough
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsdale has said Southampton ‘haven’t been good enough all season’ after the club’s ‘inevitable’ relegation was confirmed. Southampton’s relegation to the Championship was confirmed after a 3-1 defeat at Tottenham Hotspur on Sunday. Brennan Johnson’s double put the North Londoners in control, before Matheus Franca’s goal gave the Saints a late lifeline. However, Spurs […] The post Ramsdale admits relegated Southampton haven’t been good enough first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Spurs player ratings vs Southampton as Johnson the hero and Romero impressive
arts.sum: Lucas Bergvall did have the ball in the net towards the end of the first half but he was denied a first Premier League goal following a lengthy VAR check that lasted just under five minutes. Played his part in Tottenham's opening goal after spreading the ball wide to Son Heung-min and then got an assist for Johnson's second following a smart header.

arts.ttl: Southampton to be relegated after defeat at Spurs
arts.sum: Wolves' 2-1 win at Ipswich Town on Saturday had set up the possibility of Southampton being relegated on Sunday afternoon, and that prospect became all the more likely when Ivan Juric's side fell behind to Brennan Johnson's goal after just 13 minutes. Saturday's damaging home defeat by relegation rivals Wolves has all but ended Ipswich's hopes of staying in the Premier League, according to their manager Kieran McKenna .

arts.ttl: Tottenham 3-1 Southampton: Player ratings as Johnson double condemns Saints to Championship
arts.sum: Player ratings from Tottenham's 3-1 victory over Southampton in the Premier League on Sunday.
